architecture.summary: Full-file SHA-256, deterministic sort, lockfile manifest, CRLF normalization

scope.summary: Client-side vskill only (Phase 1), 8 requirements from 3-agent brainstorm

edge_cases.summary: Ghost files, BOM handling, CRLF normalization, lockfile migration, no-change skip

users.summary: Skill authors publishing updates, developers consuming skills via vskill CLI

integrations.summary: No new external integrations. Existing source types (registry, github, marketplace) unchanged. Lockfile format extended with optional files field for backward compat.

ui-ux.summary: CLI-only, no UI. Update command outputs skip/update/delete messages. No interactive prompts added.

performance.summary: Hash computation is O(n) on file count. No-change detection skips file writes entirely. No performance-sensitive paths.

security.summary: SHA-256 for integrity verification. No secrets or auth changes. Content normalization (BOM/CRLF) prevents hash manipulation via encoding tricks.

edge-cases.summary: Ghost file deletion, BOM trimming, CRLF normalization, empty version/0.0.0 migration, skill with only SKILL.md (no agents), first-time install defaults to 1.0.0.
